overall.description: First-person exploration through the Sandy Shores desert area in GTA V, beginning at a rocky coastal path with power lines and walking toward the iconic 'ENJOY SANDY SHORES' billboard on a clear morning.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal desert path with utility infrastructure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rocky coastline past wooden power line towers with water visible to the right

entered.detail: large wooden utility structure with transformers and multiple cables
series of wooden telephone poles lining the path
hazy mountain range forming the backdrop
calm lake or ocean visible along the coastline
uneven rocky dirt ground with sparse grass patches

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rocky coastal desert path in Sandy Shores, with large wooden power line towers on the left and a calm body of water visible to the right. The camera moves steadily forward along the dirt trail with mountains visible in the hazy distance.

events.description: turns left away from the coastline toward the inland highway
black pickup truck passes by on the highway to the right

agents.ego_description: turns inland from the coastal path and walks parallel to the highway through sparse desert scrub vegetation

notable_agents.action: black pickup truck driving along the paved highway

entered.detail: paved two-lane highway with yellow dividing lines
large white billboard with red text visible in the distance
tall red and white striped radio tower

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left away from the coast, revealing a paved highway to the right. A black pickup truck drives past on the road as the camera continues through desert scrubland. The iconic 'ENJOY SANDY SHORES' billboard becomes visible in the distance, and a red and white communication tower stands on the right horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert approaching the Sandy Shores welcome billboard

events.description: semi-truck with trailer drives past on the highway

agents.ego_description: continuing through the desert terrain toward the large billboard structure, walking parallel to the highway

notable_agents.action: large semi-truck with trailer traveling along the highway

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily through the open desert scrubland, with the ENJOY SANDY SHORES billboard growing larger in the center of the frame. A semi-truck passes by on the highway to the right. The terrain remains arid with scattered bushes and the power lines now closer on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: base of the large ENJOY SANDY SHORES billboard

events.description: slows to a stop at the billboard base to view the sign up close

agents.ego_description: approaches the ENJOY SANDY SHORES billboard and slows to a stop at its base to view the sign up close

entered.detail: wooden support structure holding up the large sign
purple and yellow wildflowers growing in the scrub
small green trees and large bushes at the billboard base

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the base of the massive ENJOY SANDY SHORES billboard, passing desert flowers and small trees. The highway falls behind as the camera stops at the wooden support beams, revealing the full text 'ENJOY SANDY SHORES - San Andreas Vacation Resort' on the weathered sign.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rocky coastal path through an arid desert landscape, culminating at a massive roadside billboard. It begins by moving steadily along a dirt trail beside wooden power line towers and a calm body of water, with hazy mountains looming in the distance. As the camera turns away from the coast, the scene shifts toward a paved highway where a black pickup truck passes, revealing a red and white communication tower and the distant silhouette of a billboard. The movement continues through open scrubland and scattered bushes, passing a semi-truck on the road as the billboard grows larger in the center of the frame. Finally, the camera pushes past desert flowers and small trees to stop at the wooden support beams, revealing the full weathered text of the Enjoy Sandy Shores sign.
